title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Jaswant Singh Gill, a mining engineer, leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Virgin Bhanupriya
subTitle: Bhanupriya, a conservative woman, wants to lose her virginity. Although a fortune teller warns her of it being an impossible feat, she is determined to achieve her goal.

title: Love Hostel
subTitle: A series of bloodshed, escapes and deception ensue when Jyothi and Ashu elope together and her family hires a ruthless mercenary to kill the couple.

title: Deewaanapan
subTitle: A country boy falls in love with a rich man's daughter and moves to the city to be with her. However, the girl's father is determined to go to any length to separate the lovers.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Pal Pal Dil Ke Paas
subTitle: Saher plans to expose Karan, who runs a trekking company, but ends up falling in love with him. However, tension arises when Saher's former lover decides to win her back.

title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum 3
subTitle: Kanhaiya, an adult film actor, asks his fellow actors to pose as his fake traditional family to impress his girlfriend Shalu's conservative father.

title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
subTitle: A police officer and soldier team up and decide to end the cybercriminals that pose a threat to the safety of people on the Internet.
When mobiles start flying from people's hands, Dr Vaseegaran and his robot Nila are asked to help. However, due to Pakshi Rajan having a hand in this, the two have to reinstate Chitti to defeat him.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: Biwi No. 1
subTitle: Two adorable kids, a quirky mother-in-law and a happy-go-lucky friend help a heartbroken wife bring a straying husband back from the other woman's tangled embrace.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: A special agent is assigned to protect the prime minister, who later gets assassinated. He is tasked with finding the group responsible for the assassination.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: A special agent is assigned to protect the prime minister, who later gets assassinated. He is tasked with finding the group responsible for the assassination.

title: Kites
subTitle: Jay, a dance instructor, falls in love with Tony's fiancee. They make their daring escape and get married, but Tony is determined to track them down.

title: Bhoot Returns
subTitle: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: Rock On 2
subTitle: The music band members, once separated due to the conflict, reunite and organise a rock concert, but the local authorities oppose them.

title: Mahabharat
subTitle: A dynastic struggle between the collateral branches of the Kuru clan, the Kauravas and Pandavas, for the throne of Hastinapur leads to the Kurukshetra War.

title: Second Hand Husband
subTitle: Rajbir's wish to marry Gurpreet is delayed by his former wife, to whom he has to pay alimony until she remarries. Soon, he and his current partner hatch a plan to find her a potential suitor.

title: Fukrey
subTitle: Hunny, Choocha, Lali and Zafar want to make easy money and approach the notorious Bholi to invest in their plan. But when they lose her money, they must come up with a plan or face the consequences.

title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
subTitle: Jaya marries Keshav but is disappointed to learn that there is no toilet in his house. As a result, Keshav tries to pacify her with temporary arrangements.

title: Karan Arjun
subTitle: Karan and Arjun, two brothers driven by revenge, are murdered by their uncle while seeking justice for their father's death. However, they resurrect years later to settle their unfinished score.

title: Krack
subTitle: When three notorious criminals lock horns with a hot-tempered police officer, Potharaju Shankar, little do they know that they will end up behind bars.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Naach Lucky Naach
subTitle: Ten-year-old Lakshmi dreams of winning a national-level dance competition, but she hesitates to participate when her single mother, Nandini, detests music and dance.

title: Naach Lucky Naach
subTitle: Ten-year-old Lakshmi dreams of winning a national-level dance competition, but she hesitates to participate when her single mother, Nandini, detests music and dance.

title: Lost
subTitle: A journalist relentlessly investigates to uncover the truth behind the sudden and mysterious disappearance of a young activist.

title: Aattral
subTitle: Arjun's father, who is a mechanic, manages to get INR 10 lakh to fulfil Arjun's dream of developing an automatic car. However, the former is robbed and killed by a mysterious man.

title: Crook
subTitle: After his uncle catches him selling pirated DVDs, Jai Dixit is sent to Australia with a new identity. However, whilst falling in love with a woman, he assumes yet another identity to pursue her.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
